reviews.review_description: This game is a short experience, but it's very challeging. The puzzles are a bit difficult and you have to think and stay very focus on the environment to solve them. It needs more content and, in my opinion, needs more context too, specially at the beginning, but it's fun.

If you like "Escape Rooms" you will like this title. It is not a big title, but it offers interesting puzzles and a lot of interaction possibilites, apart that the atmosphere of the game is pretty good. Take a look to it!

Even if some VR interactions could be much better (solvable with some patches), the overall puzzle design is awesome. Very Escape Room-like, with clues that are in front of you, but don't realize it until later. This leads to lots of "Eureka!" moments, which makes everything more satisfying.

Very good escape (not easy at at all!) this but it needs some extra work!
Sometimes the  physics is quite weird and some glitches are present.
Hoping in a new update, soon!

The truth is that it has been a pleasant surprise. I like virtual escape rooms like The Room VR and I have also participated in several escape rooms in real life and although I have not finished it yet, so far the experience has been very satisfying. The puzzles have a good progression and have the right point to not be too easy but not too difficult and end up being a frustrating experience. There are some details to improve but the developer has already told me that they are working on correcting them, so it's a very good experience that will offer you a very good time for a very fair price.
Makes me feel sick. First game I’ve had this issue with.

So far I’m loving the game even though I haven’t gotten too far. The puzzles are challenging but not impossibly hard to figure out like some games I’ve run into. My biggest complaint is the navigation. It gives me a bit of motion sickness. Would love to have a navigation option that takes you to key points instead to help with that :) have gotten to the lab rat so far but had to stop because my stomach couldn’t take it anymore.

Way mor then what I expected! Pleasantly surprises but dang that creature gets mad easy ! Lol great game plz tell me there's more to come! Totally recommended!!! Everyone who loves escape games should hav this in their library! Definitely one of my favs!

developer_response.body: Hello! I'm glad you liked the game. I plan in the future to make the second part longer and continue the story. It will take a while because sales have not been good, but it will come.
